chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5903 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.26175/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Mr.Gazain Z. Magsi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Syed Mohsin Ali, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R). Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that representation against suspension of sales tax is pending with the Respondent No.2 and that the petitioner would be satisfied if the same is decided expeditiously preferable within a period of 15 days after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in such terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
